# virtualization-mcp — Full Reference

## Architecture

FastMCP 3.2 server with modular plugin architecture. VirtualBox operations via VBoxManage CLI (direct) and vboxapi/pyvbox (compat layer). Hyper-V via PowerShell cmdlets. Docker sandbox via Docker SDK. Portmanteau mode consolidates 60+ individual operations into 8 portmanteau tools with 33+ operations.

### Supported Hypervisors

| Platform | Mode | Interface |
|----------|------|-----------|
| VirtualBox 7+ | Primary | VBoxManage CLI + pyvbox compat |
| Hyper-V | Windows only | PowerShell (Get-VM, Start-VM, etc.) |
| Windows Sandbox | Windows only | Native .wsb configuration |
| Docker | Container | Docker SDK for Python |

## Tools — Full Reference

### vm_management

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `list` | List all VMs (status, RAM, CPUs, OS) |
| `create` | Create VM (name, OS type, RAM, disk) |
| `start` | Start VM (headless or GUI) |
| `stop` | Stop VM (acpi/shutdown/poweroff) |
| `delete` | Delete VM and associated files |
| `clone` | Clone VM with new name and MAC policy |
| `reset` | Reset VM (hard reset) |
| `pause` | Pause VM (save state) |
| `resume` | Resume paused VM |
| `info` | Detailed VM config and runtime status |

### network_management

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `list_networks` | List host-only networks (name, CIDR, DHCP) |
| `create_network` | Create host-only network with DHCP |
| `remove_network` | Remove host-only network |
| `list_adapters` | List VM network adapters |
| `configure_adapter` | Attach adapter (NAT/bridged/host-only/internal) |

### snapshot_management

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `list` | List snapshots for a VM (name, UUID, timestamp, description) |
| `create` | Create snapshot with optional description |
| `restore` | Restore VM to snapshot state |
| `delete` | Delete snapshot |

### storage_management

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `list_controllers` | List storage controllers on a VM |
| `create_controller` | Create IDE/SATA/SCSI/SAS/USB/PCIe controller |
| `remove_controller` | Remove storage controller |
| `list_disks` | List virtual disks |
| `create_disk` | Create new VDI/VMDK/VHD disk |
| `attach_disk` | Attach disk to VM controller port |

### system_management

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `host_info` | Host system information (OS, CPU, RAM) |
| `vbox_version` | VirtualBox version and extension pack status |
| `ostypes` | List available OS type identifiers |
| `metrics` | VM performance metrics (CPU, RAM, disk, network) |
| `screenshot` | Take VM screenshot (PNG) |

### sandbox_management (Docker)

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `execute_code` | Run code in ephemeral container (python/javascript/bash) |
| `execute_file` | Run host script file in ephemeral container |
| `session_create` | Create stateful container session |
| `session_run` | Execute command in session container |
| `session_write_file` | Write file into session container |
| `session_read_file` | Read file from session container |
| `session_list` | List active sessions |
| `session_destroy` | Remove session container |

### hyperv_management

| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `list` | List Hyper-V VMs |
| `get` | Detailed VM info |
| `start` | Start VM |
| `stop` | Stop VM (force/wait options) |

### agentic_tools (LLM sampling)

- `suggest_config` — LLM recommends VM settings for use case (CI, malware sandbox, dev env)
- `sandbox_workflow` — Step-by-step plan for spin-up → work → snapshot → tear-down
- `workflow` — Autonomous multi-step VM orchestration

## Error Handling

All tools return `{"success": bool, "action": str, "data": {...}}` or `{"success": false, "error": str}`. VBoxManage errors propagated directly. Async operations use thread pool — never block event loop.

## Cross-repo Integration

- **openclaw-molt-mcp** — Sandbox provision for OpenClaw isolation
- **meta-mcp** — Fleet webapp launch/stop via port detection
